title: Senior Teacher - VIT University South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - VIT University South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
VIT University South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VIT University South Asia Partners:
VIT University South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University South Asia Partners!
